allow: Bash(for svc in user-service leave-service performance-service employee-management-service reporting-service notification-service)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''LOGIN:'''', r[''''success''''], r[''''message'''']\)")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where ProcessId=19232 get Name,ProcessId,CommandLine 2>&1")

Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.4/bin/mysql" -u root -prevworkforce@123 leave_service_db -e "
INSERT IGNORE INTO company_holidays \(name, holiday_date, description, holiday_type, is_recurring\) VALUES
\('Holi', '2026-03-24', 'Festival of Colors', 'NATIONAL', 1\),
\('Good Friday', '2026-04-03', 'Good Friday', 'NATIONAL', 0\),
\('Eid ul-Fitr', '2026-04-01', 'Eid ul-Fitr', 'NATIONAL', 0\),
\('Dr. Ambedkar Jayanti', '2026-04-14', 'National holiday', 'NATIONAL', 1\),
\('Ram Navami', '2026-04-26', 'Hindu festival', 'NATIONAL', 0\),
\('Maharashtra Day', '2026-05-01', 'Maharashtra Day', 'REGIONAL', 1\),
\('Independence Day', '2026-08-15', 'Independence Day', 'NATIONAL', 1\),
\('Ganesh Chaturthi', '2026-08-27', 'Festival', 'NATIONAL', 0\),
\('Gandhi Jayanti', '2026-10-02', 'Gandhi Jayanti', 'NATIONAL', 1\),
\('Dussehra', '2026-10-20', 'Festival', 'NATIONAL', 0\),
\('Diwali', '2026-11-08', 'Festival of Lights', 'NATIONAL', 1\),
\('Diwali Holiday', '2026-11-09', 'Diwali holiday', 'COMPANY', 0\),
\('Christmas', '2026-12-25', 'Christmas Day', 'NATIONAL', 1\),
\('New Year Eve', '2026-12-31', 'Company holiday', 'COMPANY', 0\);
SELECT id, name, holiday_date FROM company_holidays WHERE holiday_date >= CURDATE\(\) ORDER BY holiday_date LIMIT 10;")
